channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | One Year Of Op Sindoor: Why 'Round 2' Will Be A Different Beast Entirely
item.description: Another Op Sindoor - highly likely - would have to be framed and executed in quite a different milieu.
item.content:encoded: Another Op Sindoor - highly likely - would have to be framed and executed in quite a different milieu.

item.title: What Is Andes Strain, The Only Hantavirus Type Capable Of Human-To-Human Transmission?

media:content.media:description: Andes strain is the most common cause of hantavirus pulmonary syndrome

item.description: Andes virus, found in South America, is the only currently known hantavirus for which limited human-to-human transmission among contacts has been documented.
item.content:encoded: Andes virus, found in South America, is the only currently known hantavirus for which limited human-to-human transmission among contacts has been documented.

item.title: Hantavirus Is On The Rise In Argentina, Where A Stricken Cruise Ship Began Its Journey

media:content.media:description: Hantavirus usually spreads by inhaling contaminated rodent droppings and can spread person-to-person

item.description: Argentina faces a deadly hantavirus outbreak linked to a cruise ship amid rising cases attributed to climate change effects.
item.content:encoded: Argentina faces a deadly hantavirus outbreak linked to a cruise ship amid rising cases attributed to climate change effects.

item.title: JPMorgan Chase Offered $1 Million Settlement To Avoid Sexual Assault Lawsuit Against Lorna Hajdini

media:content.media:description: JPMorgan Chase offered $1 million to settle allegations against its employee, Lorna Hajdini.

item.description: JPMorgan Chase reportedly made a $1 million settlement offer to a former employee before he filed a sexual assault lawsuit.
item.content:encoded: JPMorgan Chase reportedly made a $1 million settlement offer to a former employee before he filed a sexual assault lawsuit.

item.title: 'No Symptomatic Individuals' Left On Hantavirus Cruise Ship: Operator
item.description: All passengers showing symptoms of the hantavirus have now been removed from the MV Hondius, its operator said in...
item.content:encoded: All passengers showing symptoms of the hantavirus have now been removed from the MV Hondius, its operator said in...

item.title: 2 British Nationals Self-Isolating After Hantavirus Exposure On Cruise
item.description: Two British nationals who were exposed to the dangerous hantavirus while on a cruise ship before flying back home recently are self-isolating as a precautionary measure, UK health authorities have said.
item.content:encoded: Two British nationals who were exposed to the dangerous hantavirus while on a cruise ship before flying back home recently are self-isolating as a precautionary measure, UK health authorities have said.

item.title: Patriot To THAAD: Satellite Pics Show Damage To 15 US Bases In Iran Strikes

media:content.media:description: Among the sites that were damaged was a satellite communications site in Qatar

item.description: Among the sites that were damaged in Iran's missile and drone strikes was a satellite communications site at al-Udeid Air Base in Qatar. Patriot missile defence systems at bases in Bahrain and Kuwait were also hit.
item.content:encoded: Among the sites that were damaged in Iran's missile and drone strikes was a satellite communications site at al-Udeid Air Base in Qatar. Patriot missile defence systems at bases in Bahrain and Kuwait were also hit.

item.title: KLM Flight Attendant Tested For Hantavirus, Says Dutch Health Ministry
item.description: A flight attendant for the KLM airline is being tested for the hantavirus after showing mild symptoms and being admitted to hospital in Amsterdam.
item.content:encoded: A flight attendant for the KLM airline is being tested for the hantavirus after showing mild symptoms and being admitted to hospital in Amsterdam.

item.title: Amazon Rainforest Near "Point Of No Return" At 1.5 Degrees Warming: Study

media:content.media:description: Already 17-18% of the Amazon has been lost.

item.description: The study finds that at 22-28% deforestation combined with 1.51.9C of warming, the forest could lose its ability to sustain itself across vast areas.
item.content:encoded: The study finds that at 22-28% deforestation combined with 1.51.9C of warming, the forest could lose its ability to sustain itself across vast areas.

item.title: Senior Hezbollah Commander Killed In Israeli Strike On Beirut

media:content.media:description: The strike hit a meeting of Radwan leaders in Ghobeiri, a Hezbollah stronghold (Representational).

item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said his military had targeted "the commander of Hezbollah's Radwan force".
item.content:encoded: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said his military had targeted "the commander of Hezbollah's Radwan force".

item.title: Japan Fires Missiles During Defence Drills, Draws China's Criticism

media:content.media:description: China condemned the missile tests, accusing Japan of remilitarisation (File Photo)

item.description: Japan fired Type-88 missiles around 75 kilometres offshore in the South China Sea as a part of its military exercise.
item.content:encoded: Japan fired Type-88 missiles around 75 kilometres offshore in the South China Sea as a part of its military exercise.

item.title: Countries Rush To Track Passengers From Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship

media:content.media:description: The Andean hantavirus strain, spread by close contact, was confirmed in the victims

item.description: Eight people, including a Swiss citizen, are suspected to have contracted hantavirus, according to the World Health Organisation.
item.content:encoded: Eight people, including a Swiss citizen, are suspected to have contracted hantavirus, according to the World Health Organisation.

item.title: Online Sale Of Used Shoes Linked To Japanese Schoolgirls Sparks Outrage
item.description: Critics say the appeal isn't the shoes themselves, but the "commodified image of the schoolgirl behind them".
item.content:encoded: Critics say the appeal isn't the shoes themselves, but the "commodified image of the schoolgirl behind them".

item.title: Ex-JPMorgan Banker Sought Legal Chatbot's Help To Accuse Ex-Boss Of Rape

media:content.media:description: After the case went viral, Hajdini issued a statement via her lawyers, denying the allegations

item.description: The lawsuit -- which, according to JPMorgan Chase, is entirely fabricated -- was filed in the Manhattan Supreme Court docket this week after it was filed and then quickly pulled last week.
item.content:encoded: The lawsuit -- which, according to JPMorgan Chase, is entirely fabricated -- was filed in the Manhattan Supreme Court docket this week after it was filed and then quickly pulled last week.

item.title: About 40 passengers Left Ship Hit By Hantavirus Outbreak At Island Of St. Helena
item.description: Recent update on the hantavirus outbreak details that about 40 passengers from a cruise ship by a deadly hantavirus outbreak have disembarked on St. Helena.
item.content:encoded: Recent update on the hantavirus outbreak details that about 40 passengers from a cruise ship by a deadly hantavirus outbreak have disembarked on St. Helena.

item.title: How A Dutch Couple Became The First Hantavirus Patients Of The Current Outbreak

media:content.media:description: The Dutch couple at the centre of the MV Hondius outbreak travelled across South America

item.description: The first passengers linked to the MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak had travelled across Argentina, Chile and Uruguay before boarding the ship. Investigators are now tracing exposures, rodent contact and possible Andes virus transmission routes.
item.content:encoded: The first passengers linked to the MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak had travelled across Argentina, Chile and Uruguay before boarding the ship. Investigators are now tracing exposures, rodent contact and possible Andes virus transmission routes.

item.title: Judge Who Handed South Korea's Ex-First Lady 4-Year Jail Term Found Dead

media:content.media:description: South Korea's former first lady Kim Keon Hee, wife of impeached former president Yoon Suk Yeol.

item.description: The judge, identified as Shin Jong-oh, was discovered with serious injuries in a flower bed close to the court complex in Seoul’s Seocho district.
item.content:encoded: The judge, identified as Shin Jong-oh, was discovered with serious injuries in a flower bed close to the court complex in Seoul’s Seocho district.

item.title: WHO Updates Hantavirus Outbreak Toolbox: How These Protocols Save Lives

media:content.media:description: Hantavirus is a serious viral infection

item.description: The WHO Outbreak Toolkit is a specialised digital resource designed to standardise and accelerate the response to public health emergencies.
item.content:encoded: The WHO Outbreak Toolkit is a specialised digital resource designed to standardise and accelerate the response to public health emergencies.

item.title: WHO Chief Tells AFP Hantavirus Outbreak Not Like Start Of Covid Pandemic

media:content.media:description: WHO chief told AFP Wednesday the cruise ship hantavirus outbreak isn't like Covid's early days

item.description: WHO chief told AFP Wednesday the cruise ship hantavirus outbreak isn't like Covid's early days.
item.content:encoded: WHO chief told AFP Wednesday the cruise ship hantavirus outbreak isn't like Covid's early days.

item.title: Inside The Cruise Ship At The Centre Of A Rare Hantavirus Outbreak

media:content.media:description: Two of the cases - a woman who died and the evacuated man - tested positive for hantavirus

item.description: A cruise ship off West Africa faces a hantavirus outbreak with three deaths and passengers isolating amid health monitoring.
item.content:encoded: A cruise ship off West Africa faces a hantavirus outbreak with three deaths and passengers isolating amid health monitoring.
